human-review.evidence: Human approved feature 0001 (Edit menu + toast preference, error-bypass per ESC-001). Approved commit + release.

escalations.reason: Default-OFF toasts suppress error/failure feedback too, including the editor Save-failed toast (only signal of a failed write) -> silent data-loss path; breaks documented runOp guarantee. Need human decision: should error toasts bypass the disable toggle?
escalations.decision: Errors always show: the toast disable toggle silences only success/info toasts; kind==='error' toasts ALWAYS render regardless of the toastsEnabled setting. Add an explicit error-bypass requirement + a test pinning it. Default for non-error toasts stays OFF.

loopbacks.reason: Human resolved ESC-001 (FINDING-DA-001): error toasts must bypass the disable toggle. Re-propagate from brainstorm -> spec adds error-bypass REQ, tests pin it, implement adds the kind==='error' carve-out.
